name: create_spreadsheet
description: Create a new Google Spreadsheet in the operator's Google Drive. Returns the spreadsheet_id (use it with read_sheet / update_sheet_values / sheets_batch_update) and a shareable edit URL.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON with spreadsheet_id, title, and a docs.google.com/spreadsheets edit url (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator (Sheets scope granted by the Google sign-in in onboarding). After creating, write data with update_sheet_values or restructure with sheets_batch_update.
